headline: Capex boom threatens to crowd out buybacks, key equity demand driver
summary: Investing.com -- A surge in artificial intelligence-related capital spending is unlikely to undermine share buybacks across the broader U.S. equity market, according to a Deutsche Bank strategy note, which said record corporate earnings continue to support shareholder returns despite a sharp rise in investment spending.

content.title: Capex boom threatens to crowd out buybacks, key equity demand driver

headline: Check Point (CHKP) Brings AI Security To Amazon Bedrock AgentCore

headline: Is Check Point (CHKP) Using Amazon Bedrock Integration To Redefine Its AI Security Moat?
summary: Earlier in June 2026, Check Point Software Technologies announced an upcoming integration with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore to extend its security controls into agentic AI workflows for AWS customers. This move brings Check Point’s AI behavioral monitoring, guardrails against prompt attacks, and partner-specific detection signals directly into Bedrock AgentCore’s enforcement layer, potentially strengthening its role in securing enterprise AI workloads. We’ll now examine how embedding Check...

headline: Slate's CEO on launching a $25K EV and why it's 'fun to have a contrarian point of view'
summary: A new car for under $25,000 is rare enough in America these days, but one that happens to be an EV pickup is a downright unicorn. That's the bet Slate is making with its first EV, and CEO Peter Faricy is not shy about singing its praises.

headline: Is Oracle’s Debt Simply Too Much to Justify the Risk?
summary: Artificial intelligence has created an unusual investing environment. Companies willing to spend hundreds of billions of dollars building data centers are being rewarded with enormous growth expectations, while those sitting on the sidelines risk falling behind. The challenge is that AI infrastructure is expensive, and not every company has the balance sheet of Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT), ... Is Oracle’s Debt Simply Too Much to Justify the Risk?
